ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone in which the event occurs */,
  "recurrence_pattern" TEXT /* Recurrence pattern (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event category */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the event */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_timezone FOREIGN KEY ("timezone") REFERENCES timezones ("timezone_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "timezone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred time zone */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_timezone_id FOREIGN KEY ("timezone_id") REFERENCES timezones ("timezone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timezones" (
  "timezone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time zone */,
  "timezone_name" TEXT /* Name of the time zone (e.g., UTC, EST) */,
  "utc_offset" TEXT /* UTC offset of the time zone */,
  "dst" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if Daylight Saving Time is observed */,
  "dst_start" TEXT /* Start date and time of Daylight Saving Time */,
  "dst_end" TEXT /* End date and time of Daylight Saving Time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the time zone was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the time zone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timezone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the date format (e.g., MM/DD/YY, YYYY-MM-DD) */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of the date format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the date format was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the date format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_formats" (
  "time_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time format */,
  "time_format_name" TEXT /* Name of the time format (e.g., 12-hour, 24-hour) */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of the time format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the time format was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the time format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the reminder */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time at which the reminder should trigger */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reminder was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reminder was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attending the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's attendance (e.g., confirmed, tentative, declined) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attendance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category (e.g., meeting, task) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notes_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change occurred */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., one-off, recurring) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "date_format_id" INTEGER /* Preferred date format ID */,
  "time_format_id" INTEGER /* Preferred time format ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the preference was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_date_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_format_id") REFERENCES date_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_time_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_format_id") REFERENCES time_formats ("time_format_id")
)
